ast.name: description
ast.source: Render math in display mode, which puts the math in display style (so \int and \sum are large, for example), and centers the math on the page on its own line.
ast.target: 以显示模式渲染数学公式，将公式置于显示样式（例如 \int 和 \sum 会变大），并在页面上单独成行居中显示。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Determines the markup language of the output.

ast.name: description
ast.source: Render display math in leqno style (left-justified tags).
ast.target: 以 leqno 样式渲染显示公式（左对齐编号）。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 将显示公式左对齐渲染。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Makes \color behave like LaTeX's 2-argument \textcolor, instead of LaTeX's one-argument \color mode change.
ast.target: 使 \color 的行为类似 LaTeX 的双参数 \textcolor，而不是 LaTeX 的单参数 \color 模式切换。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Turn on strict / LaTeX faithfulness mode, which throws an error if the input uses features that are not supported by LaTeX.
ast.target: 开启严格/LaTeX 忠实模式，如果输入使用了 LaTeX 不支持的特性则抛出错误。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Trust the input, enabling all HTML features such as \url.
ast.target: 信任输入，启用所有 HTML 特性，如 \url。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Limit the number of macro expansions to the specified number, to prevent e.g. infinite macro loops. If set to Infinity, the macro expander will try to fully expand as in LaTeX.
ast.target: 将宏展开次数限制为指定数量，以防止例如无限宏循环。如果设置为 Infinity，宏展开器将像在 LaTeX 中一样尝试完全展开。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Fork or join in process flow

ast.name: description
ast.source: Markdown-ish syntax for generating flowcharts, mindmaps, sequence diagrams, class diagrams, gantt charts, git graphs and more.
ast.target: 用于生成流程图、思维导图、时序图、类图、甘特图、Git 图等的类 Markdown 语法。

ast.name: message
ast.source: Trailing quote on quoted field is malformed
ast.target: 带引号字段的末尾引号格式错误

ast.name: message
ast.source:
Warning: No LINE_BREAKS Found.
	This Lexer has been defined to track line and column information,
	But none of the Token Types can be identified as matching a line terminator.
	See https://chevrotain.io/docs/guide/resolving_lexer_errors.html#LINE_BREAKS 
	for details.
ast.target:
警告：未找到 LINE_BREAKS。
	该词法分析器被定义为跟踪行和列信息，
	但没有任何 Token 类型可被识别为匹配行终止符。
	详见 https://chevrotain.io/docs/guide/resolving_lexer_errors.html#LINE_BREAKS 
	了解详情。

ast.name: message
ast.target: 已将分支 feature 合并到 main

ast.name: message
ast.target: 已将 [object Object] 拣选到 release

ast.name: message
ast.source: The grid always uses the browser's ResizeObserver, this grid option has no effect.
ast.target: 该网格始终使用浏览器的 ResizeObserver，此网格选项无效。

ast.name: message
ast.source: Either use `onDisplayedColumnsChanged` which is fired at the same time, or use one of the more specific column events.
ast.target: 请使用同时触发的 `onDisplayedColumnsChanged`，或使用更具体的列事件之一。

ast.name: message
ast.source: `gridOptions` and `columnDefs` both have a `context` property that should be used for arbitrary user data. This means that column definitions and gridOptions should only contain valid properties making this property redundant.
ast.target: `gridOptions` 和 `columnDefs` 都有 `context` 属性，应用于任意用户数据。这意味着列定义和 gridOptions 只应包含有效属性，因此该属性是冗余的。

ast.name: message
ast.source: Advanced filter no longer uses function evaluation, so this option has no effect.
ast.target: 高级筛选不再使用函数求值，因此此选项无效。

ast.name: message
ast.source: `showLoadingOverlay` is deprecated. Use the grid option "loading"=true instead or setGridOption("loading", true).
ast.target: `showLoadingOverlay` 已弃用。请改用网格选项 "loading"=true，或使用 setGridOption("loading", true)。
